{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Monarch sacred arts
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Monarchs]] possess [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
